title: Direttiva mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, l-Ekonomija u Investiment
title_en: Direttiva mill-Ministru tal-Finanzi, l-Ekonomija u Investiment
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/502.1/mlt, expression eli/sl/502.1/20110817/mlt).

provisions.title: L-AVVI| LEGALI 361 tal-2010
provisions.content:
It-titolu ta’ din id-Direttiva hu Direttiva mill-Ministru talFinanzi, l-Ekonomija u Investiment g]all-}ru[ ta’ Euro 30,000,000
Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
G]andu jin]are[ ammont ta’ Euro 30,000,000 Stock talGvern ta’ Malta 2013 (VI) b’Rata ta’ Mg]ax li Tvarja marbuta malEuribor tas-sitt xhur.

}ru[ ta’ Stock.

provisions.title: Titolu
provisions.content:
Il-]ru[ ta’ Stocks ser isir kif stipulat fil-prospett.

Mod tal-]ru[ ta’
Stock.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
Kull persuna u, jew enti jistg]u japplikaw g]al dan liStock. It-tqassim tal-iStock isir kif hemm spjegat fil-prospett.

Policy dwar lallokazzjoni ta’
Stock.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
Ta]t id-disposizzjonijiet tal-Att dwar is-Swieq Finanzjarji,
meta dan l-iStock ji[i allokat, g]andha ssir applikazzjoni sabiex liStock jitqieg]ed fuq il-lista uffi`jali u biex ikun negozjat fil-Bor\a
ta’ Malta.

Negozju fil-Bor\a
ta’ Malta.
Kap. 345.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
Is-somma ta’ flus li g]andha tin[abar bl-iStock imsemmi
tkun ta’ Euro 30,000,000.

Somma ta’ flus li
g]andha tin[abar.

provisions.title: Stock
provisions.content:
L-img]ax jit]allas bir-Rata ta’ Mg]ax li Tvarja kull sitt
xhur marbuta mal-Euribor tas-sitt xhur fis-se]] fid-data meta ti[i
m]abbra flimkien ma’ "spread" fissa ta’ 45bps u ma]duma fuq Day
Count Fraction "(Actual/360)" g]al kull Euro 100. Tali spread ta’
45 basis points (bps) hija fissa u applikabbli g]al tul il-]ajja taliStock. L-img]ax jit]allas kull sitt xhur b’lura fl-11 ta’ Frar u fil-11
ta’ Awwissu ta’ kull sena sakemm idum l-iStock. L-ewwel ]las
g]all-perjodu bejn il-11 ta’ Awwissu, 2010 u l-10 ta’ Frar, 2011 (i\\ew[ dati inklu\i) isir fil-11 ta’ Frar, 2011.

Rata ta’ mg]ax u
dati tal-]las.

provisions.title: dati tal-]las
provisions.content:
Stock tal-Gvern ta’ Malta 2013 (VI) b’Rata ta’ Mg]ax li
Tvarja marbuta mal-Euribor tas-sitt xhur ji[i mifdi b’parità fil-11
ta’ Awwissu, 2013.

Fidwa ta’ Stock.
